title: Purely Plantbased Mediterranean Green Olive Paella
description: A grassy, juicy, festive Mediterranean dish featuring green olives, perfect for any occasion, made in a fondue pot for a fun and interactive dining experience.
instructions: Heat the fondue pot over medium heat and add the chopped red onion and minced garlic to saute until softened.
Add the smoked paprika and saffron threads to the pot and stir for 1 minute to combine.
Add the vegetable broth, brown rice, artichoke hearts, cherry tomatoes, and green olives to the pot and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes or until the rice is tender.
Stir in the lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the paella hot, straight from the fondue pot, and enjoy.
Garnish with fresh parsley or lemon wedges, if desired.
Let the paella rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
